---
title: "About"
image: images/raven-old.png
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app/
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
---

This blog serves as a place for me to post written pieces, videos, and code for whatever project I want to share. It's all for fun.

Here is one of my favorite goth songs.

{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=AM8SXViIzOI >}}
